items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Sunshine Fabric Handbag, printed with brown FF jacquard pattern and light brown leather FENDI ROMA lettering, with a hard leather handle. Features a spacious lined interior compartment, light brown leather edges, and gold-finished metal hardware. Can be carried with the double handle, and two internal hook clasps can be used to secure the shoulder strap. Model: FD8372, Dimensions: 40.5*21.5*35cm

items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Sunshine Leather Mini Handbag, embossed with FENDI ROMA lettering and a tortoiseshell-effect hard organic glass handle, equipped with a lined interior compartment, accented with matching leather trim and gold hardware, featuring two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, allowing for both hand and shoulder carry. Model: FD8051, Dimensions: 13*6.5*18cm
items.name_cn: 👄FENDI New Sunshine Leather Mini Handbag, embossed with FENDI ROMA lettering and a tortoiseshell-effect hard organic glass handle, equipped with a lined interior compartment, accented with matching leather trim and gold hardware, featuring two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, allowing for both hand and shoulder carry. items.name_en: 👄FENDI New X-Tote Medium Handbag, Houndstooth Wool material, decorated with FF embroidery. Accented with matching leather trim and a classic turnlock. Unlined, with a snap-button closure pocket and brown and gold-finished metal hardware. Equipped with two short handles for hand carry and two long handles for shoulder carry. Model: FD8374, Dimensions: 41*16*29.5cm

items.name_en: 💰Medium Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Adorned with signature FF decoration in matching patent leather. Features a knotted long calfskin pull tab, with an internal lined compartment featuring a zip pocket, and silver hardware. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody carrying.

items.name_en: 💰The latest runway Large Simply FENDI, classic Monogram fabric paired with dark coffee calfskin, exuding a high-end relaxed vibe. Features leather-like hardware with hand-stitched details, low-key yet eye-catching. The adjustable shoulder strap is a great addition. Handheld, crossbody, or underarm carry adapts to any style, so cool!

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade Replica Fendi
💗Large Monogram
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed under Kim Jones, this is the first FEND1, overturning the previous bag shape. The metal trim and large Logo lock, combined with the body design, fuse architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, it grabs attention instantly! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also gives a high-end street chic vibe when slung!
Large size 32.5x15x23.5cm
